manual_ref: Web Services Guide Rev D, Table 212 (physicalLibrary/elements)
fidelity_notes: Emulator correctly requires a session (401 without auth). SUSPECT: the authenticated element coordinate is a simplified 3-tuple (e.g. '1,1,1') rather than the real frame/rack/section/column/row; certify the coordinate shape against a capture (roadmap Phase 0 ScalarCoordinate). An authenticated element-list case needs session support in the harness.
